title: Victoria Memorial Institute (Repeal) Act
citation: Laws of Zambia — Victoria Memorial Institute (Repeal) Act

sections.heading: C ourt to give orders and directions
sections.text:
C ourt to give orders and directions
CHAPTER 177
VICTORIA MEMORIAL INSTITUTE (REPEAL) 5 of 1952
An Act to make provision for the disposal of the property of the trust of the Victoria
Memorial Institute.
[24th July, 1952]

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Victoria Memorial Institute (Repeal) Act. Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Victoria Memorial Institute (Repeal) Act. Short title
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia

sections.heading: All property of whatever nature of the Victoria Memorial Institute which is at the Property of Institute
sections.text:
All property of whatever nature of the Victoria Memorial Institute which is at the Property of Institute
commencement of this Act vested in the trustees or the Committee of Management of the
said Institute shall continue to be vested in the said trustees or Committee of Management
respectively until such time as orders and directions have been made or given in respect
of that property by the High Court under the provisions of section three.

sections.heading: A Judge of the High Court shall give such orders and directions as to the Court to give orders
sections.text:
A Judge of the High Court shall give such orders and directions as to the Court to give orders
disposal of the property mentioned in section two as may seem to him to be just and and directions
equitable.
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
